title: UK Man Was Assaulted By Attackers. Cops Arrested Him Instead As Accused Fled
summary_full: A clip of the footage was shared by Reform UK's Shadow Chancellor and Newark MP Robert Jenrick, who criticised the Birmingham Police in multiple posts.
